MINI MINUTES: Appearance by Jess Pavon Yanez, Esq. for Plaintiff; appearance by Mark David Lipton, Esq. for Defendant. The Order to Show Cause is re-set to NOV-26-2013 at 10:30 AM in Department 610. Proceedings not reported. (610)

MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Jun-24-2013 Assigned To Trial Court

SHORT CAUSE TRIAL
Off Calendar Jun-24-2013 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Cse consolidated with case No. CGC11-516361 Zeno Zimmerman vs. City and Conty of San Francisco.
This matter comes on calendar this day, having been assigned from The Presiding Judge Department 206 for the court to approve Terms and conditions of Settlement.
Department 514, Judge: Donald Sullivan, Clerk: Yolanda Mazariegos, CSR: Sonia Wong, #11288.
Jess P. Yanez, Esq., appearing for Plaintiff Zeno Zimmerman.
Plaintiff Zeno Zimmerman present in court.
Mark D. Lipton, Deuty City Attorney appearing for Defendant City and County of San Francisco.
The only Defendant left in these consolidated cases is Defendant City and County of San Francisco.
Case has settled.
Terms and conditions of settlement read into the record. Court approved settlement as read into the record. Counsel indicated to the court that the clerk in Department 206 will be scheduling this matter for the CRC3.1385 Calendar on 9/24/2013 in department 610. Counsel to file a dismissal prior to the Order to Show Cause.

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE

Appearances:
Jess P. Yanez, Esq., from JPY Law Group, 510-446-7726, for defendant and moving party
